# fcs_published_app (Resource)

Publishes a Kubernetes Service from an fcs_namespace or fcs_flex_cluster through the public app gateway (*.free.k8s.focusnet.de or *.flex.k8s.focusnet.de). All configurable attributes force replacement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_slug` (String) DNS label used for the public hostname. Must be lowercase letters, digits and single hyphen-separated segments (3-63 chars, no leading, trailing or repeated hyphen) and must not be a reserved platform slug. The API appends the tenant marker before the tier domain. Changing it forces a new published app.
- `namespace_id` (String) ID of the fcs_namespace or fcs_flex_cluster whose in-cluster Service should be published. Changing it forces a new published app.
- `service_name` (String) Kubernetes Service name inside the vcluster namespace. Changing it forces a new published app.
- `service_port` (Number) Service port to publish (1-65535). Changing it forces a new published app.

### Optional

- `path_prefix` (String) Optional HTTP path prefix to route to the Service, e.g. "/" or "/api". Changing it forces a new published app.
- `vcluster_namespace` (String) Namespace inside the vcluster that contains the Service. Defaults to "default". Changing it forces a new published app.

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) Public hostname assigned by the app gateway, including the tenant marker.
- `id` (Number) Server-assigned published app ID. The public API contract returns this as an integer.
- `tls_mode` (String) TLS mode applied by the app gateway. Currently auto.
